mission.title: opengemini: fix: ts-cli output corrupted
mission.description:
### What problem does this PR solve?

fix #519 

### What is changed and how it works?
Fixed issues in my own `go-prompt`  fork where unwanted control characters may be output to screen and part of output cannot be erased from screen. For more details, please see my comment in #519 and https://github.com/StepY1aoZz/go-prompt/pull/1 

# Checklist:

- [x] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [x] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [x] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [x] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [x] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published in downstream modules

steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
